positive: A stylized, detailed silhouette of a friendly woodland animal—a fox and a bear cub—playing together in a vibrant, overgrown forest clearing. The scene should be rendered in a high-contrast, single-color vector art style with minimal negative space, perfect for apparel printing. Emphasize clean outlines and bold, solid shapes. Composition must be centered and dynamic. Lighting should suggest bright, dappled sunlight filtering through leaves, creating sharp edges. Color palette should be highly versatile (e.g., designed to work well in single ink or two-tone printing) with deep forest greens, burnt orange accents, and earthy browns. Intricate leaf and branch elements frame the subjects, ensuring the overall design is scalable and visually appealing on fabric. Flat vector graphics style, maximalist yet clean.
negative: photorealism, noise, blur, artifacts, low detail, gradient, smoke, sketch, writing, text, watermark, logo, trademark, cartoon, anime, grainy, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs
